WHAT ONE PROMPT
CAN ACTUALLY CREATE.

Professional Headshot

Studio-quality portrait. Clean background, professional lighting, sharp focus. Ready for LinkedIn, your website, or any profile.

Used for: Website about page, LinkedIn profile
Lifestyle Working Shot

Natural, candid energy. Shows you in your element — working, thinking, building. Not posed. Not stock.

Used for: Instagram feed, blog headers, email
Editorial Brand Image

Campaign-level visuals. The kind of photos that make people stop scrolling and pay attention to your brand.

Used for: Social media, sales pages, campaigns

HERE'S WHAT HAPPENS IN
90 MINUTES.

This isn't a vague "learn AI" workshop. You follow along and leave with actual images ready to use.

01

Brand Visual Direction

We define your look — colours, clothing, settings, mood — so AI knows exactly what to create. Takes 15 minutes.

02

Your Brand Double Prompt

You'll build the master text prompt that describes YOU to AI. This is the core asset — use it to generate unlimited images forever.

03

Generate 3+ Images Live

Professional headshot. Lifestyle shot. Branded social image. You create all three in class, with me walking you through each one.

04

Variation System

Learn how to modify your prompt for different outfits, settings, and moods — so one prompt becomes dozens of unique images.

05

Platform Placement Guide

Where to use each image — website, Instagram, LinkedIn, email headers. Specific recommendations, not guesswork.

06

Replay + Prompt To Keep

Can't make it live? Full replay included. Plus your completed prompt saved and ready to use whenever you want.

QUESTIONS.

Do I need any tech experience?

No. If you can type a sentence, you can do this. Most people in the class have never used an AI image tool before.

Will the images look like me?

AI generates images based on your text description. I teach you exactly how to describe yourself for the closest match. The more specific, the better.

What tools do I need?

A laptop or computer with internet. I walk you through which AI tools to use and how to set them up. Most have free tiers.

What if I miss the live class?

Full replay included. Watch anytime, follow along at your own pace. You still get everything.

Can I make unlimited images after?

Yes. Your prompt is yours forever. Change the outfit, setting, or mood. No extra cost, no limit.

Is this only for certain businesses?

No. If you need professional photos and don't have them, this is for you. Any industry, any business, men and women.

YOUR BRAND DESERVES
BETTER PHOTOS.

90 minutes. £27. You'll leave with professional images ready to post and a prompt system that works forever. No photographer, no studio, no experience needed.
